category_sources: source_facts.description says it selects the right Node package manager based on lockfiles; official README says "use the right package manager".
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is ni; official GitHub README heading and package commands use ni.
docs_sources: Official repository README documents ni, nr, and related commands with examples.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub project URL; official GitHub page identifies antfu-collective/ni.
tags_sources: source_facts.executables lists ni/nr/nlx variants; official README shows npm, yarn, pnpm, bun, and deno command mapping.
